title: Community Lab Template
description: Minimal template for authoring a safe Docker-only community lab. Copy this folder and replace ids, tasks, and markers.
safetyNotes: Keep all learner actions inside the container.
tasks: Create the completion marker described in the briefing
Run Check in the lab panel

objectivesPublic.label: Create completion marker
objectivesPublic.hint: Use touch with the path from the briefing.

hints: Replace this template id and paths when copying.
Add a Dockerfile + lab-setup.sh to make the lab runnable.
successCriteria: Completion marker file exists at the path in validation

skillsPracticed: Replace objectives and validation for your scenario.
